# Pore Fluid

**Summary**: The fluids (water, gas, oil) present within the pore spaces of a rock.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023]] accounted for pore-fluid properties in the Gassmann model.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023]] Determines the seismic response of the rock.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023]] Input for Gassmann equations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Used to determine the bulk modulus of the fluid mixture. ([[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023, p. 27]])
